choose.otherwise: AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR writer LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )

mapper.sql: board_id , title , content , writer , view_cnt , notice_yn , delete_yn , created_date , modified_date , secret_yn , password
mapper.update: UPDATE notice_board_info SET delete_yn = 1 WHERE board_id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notice_board_info WHERE delete_yn = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE notice_board_info SET view_cnt = view_cnt + 1 WHERE board_id = #{value}
